title: apium lineare
intro: Apium lineare, also known as linear celery, is a species of plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a diuretic and having anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Apium lineare include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Apium lineare can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
